```{r}
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_lew, y = length), col = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", linetype = lty_set("lea", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 1), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_lew, y = length, fill = "Spring'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_lew, y = length), col = "cornflowerblue", fill = "cornflowerblue", linetype = lty_set("lea", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 2), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_lew, y = length, fill = "Fall'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_lew, y = length), col = "slateblue", fill = "slateblue", linetype = lty_set("lea", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 3), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_lew, y = length, fill = "Spring'25"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_lew, y = length), col = "purple4", fill = "purple4", linetype = lty_set("lea", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(A) Predicted ", LEA[offset], " vs Length at Lewisetta")), x = "LEA Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Monitoring Events", breaks = c("Fall'23", "Spring'24", "Fall'24","Spring'25"), values = c("Fall'23"="cadetblue3","Spring'24"="cornflowerblue","Fall'24"="slateblue","Spring'25"="purple4"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitLEA_lew_len_nosel

goFitLEA_yrk_len_nosel <-  ggplot(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver",]) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_yrk, y = length, fill = "Fall'23"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_yrk, y = length), col = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", linetype = lty_set("lea", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 1), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_yrk, y = length, fill = "Spring'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_yrk, y = length), col = "cornflowerblue", fill = "cornflowerblue", linetype = lty_set("lea", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 2), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_yrk, y = length, fill = "Fall'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_yrk, y = length), col = "slateblue", fill = "slateblue", linetype = lty_set("lea", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 3), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_yrk, y = length, fill = "Spring'25"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_yrk, y = length), col = "purple4", fill = "purple4", linetype = lty_set("lea", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(B) Predicted ", LEA[offset], " vs Length at York River")), x = "LEA Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Monitoring Events", breaks = c("Fall'23", "Spring'24", "Fall'24","Spring'25"), values = c("Fall'23"="cadetblue3","Spring'24"="cornflowerblue","Fall'24"="slateblue","Spring'25"="purple4"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitLEA_yrk_len_nosel

# plot go lea vs len at both sites just final time point
goFitLEA_plotfinalTlen_nosel <- ggplot(data = fullfit) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_lew, y = length, fill = "Lewisetta"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_lew, y = length), col = "mediumspringgreen", fill = "darkseagreen2", linetype = lty_set("lea", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 4), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_yrk, y = length, fill = "YorkRiver"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_lea_go_yrk, y = length), col = "dodgerblue", fill = "dodgerblue", linetype = lty_set("lea", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(A) Predicted ", LEA[offset], " vs Final Length")), x = "LEA Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Experimental Site", breaks = c("Lewisetta", "YorkRiver"), values = c("Lewisetta"="mediumspringgreen", "YorkRiver"="dodgerblue"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitLEA_plotfinalTlen_nosel
```


RDA GO vs length:

With selection lines:

```{r}
# plot rda vs len at each site/time point
goFitRDA_lew_len <- ggplot(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta",]) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length, fill = "Fall'23"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length), col = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 1), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length, fill = "Spring'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length), col = "cornflowerblue", fill = "cornflowerblue", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 2), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length, fill = "Fall'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length), col = "slateblue", fill = "slateblue", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 3), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length, fill = "Spring'25"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length), col = "purple4", fill = "purple4", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(C) Predicted ", RDA[offset], " vs Length at Lewisetta, with Selection Lines")), x = "RDA Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Monitoring Events", breaks = c("Fall'23", "Spring'24", "Fall'24","Spring'25"), values = c("Fall'23"="cadetblue3","Spring'24"="cornflowerblue","Fall'24"="slateblue","Spring'25"="purple4"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitRDA_lew_len

goFitRDA_yrk_len <-  ggplot(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver",]) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length, fill = "Fall'23"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length), col = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 1), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length, fill = "Spring'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length), col = "cornflowerblue", fill = "cornflowerblue", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 2), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length, fill = "Fall'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length), col = "slateblue", fill = "slateblue", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 3), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length, fill = "Spring'25"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length), col = "purple4", fill = "purple4", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(D) Predicted ", RDA[offset], " vs Length at York River, with Selection Lines")), x = "RDA Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Monitoring Events", breaks = c("Fall'23", "Spring'24", "Fall'24","Spring'25"), values = c("Fall'23"="cadetblue3","Spring'24"="cornflowerblue","Fall'24"="slateblue","Spring'25"="purple4"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitRDA_yrk_len

# plot rda vs len at both sites just final time point
goFitRDA_plotfinalTlen <- ggplot(data = fullfit) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length, fill = "Lewisetta"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length), col = "mediumspringgreen", fill = "darkseagreen2", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 4), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length, fill = "YorkRiver"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length), col = "dodgerblue", fill = "dodgerblue", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(B) Predicted ", RDA[offset], " vs Final Length, with Selection Lines")), x = "RDA Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Experimental Site", breaks = c("Lewisetta", "YorkRiver"), values = c("Lewisetta"="mediumspringgreen", "YorkRiver"="dodgerblue"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitRDA_plotfinalTlen
```

Without selection lines:

```{r}
# plot rda vs len at each site/time point
goFitRDA_lew_len_nosel <- ggplot(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta",]) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length, fill = "Fall'23"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length), col = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 1), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length, fill = "Spring'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length), col = "cornflowerblue", fill = "cornflowerblue", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 2), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length, fill = "Fall'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length), col = "slateblue", fill = "slateblue", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 3), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length, fill = "Spring'25"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length), col = "purple4", fill = "purple4", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(C) Predicted ", RDA[offset], " vs Length at Lewisetta")), x = "RDA Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Monitoring Events", breaks = c("Fall'23", "Spring'24", "Fall'24","Spring'25"), values = c("Fall'23"="cadetblue3","Spring'24"="cornflowerblue","Fall'24"="slateblue","Spring'25"="purple4"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitRDA_lew_len_nosel

goFitRDA_yrk_len_nosel <-  ggplot(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver",]) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length, fill = "Fall'23"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length), col = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 1), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length, fill = "Spring'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length), col = "cornflowerblue", fill = "cornflowerblue", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 2), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length, fill = "Fall'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length), col = "slateblue", fill = "slateblue", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 3), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length, fill = "Spring'25"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length), col = "purple4", fill = "purple4", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(D) Predicted ", RDA[offset], " vs Length at York River")), x = "RDA Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Monitoring Events", breaks = c("Fall'23", "Spring'24", "Fall'24","Spring'25"), values = c("Fall'23"="cadetblue3","Spring'24"="cornflowerblue","Fall'24"="slateblue","Spring'25"="purple4"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitRDA_yrk_len_nosel

# plot rda vs len at both sites just final time point
goFitRDA_plotfinalTlen_nosel <- ggplot(data = fullfit) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length, fill = "Lewisetta"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_lew, y = length), col = "mediumspringgreen", fill = "darkseagreen2", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 4), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length, fill = "YorkRiver"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_rda_yrk, y = length), col = "dodgerblue", fill = "dodgerblue", linetype = lty_set("rda", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(B) Predicted ", RDA[offset], " vs Final Length")), x = "RDA Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Experimental Site", breaks = c("Lewisetta", "YorkRiver"), values = c("Lewisetta"="mediumspringgreen", "YorkRiver"="dodgerblue"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitRDA_plotfinalTlen_nosel
```


GF geno GO vs length: 

With selection lines:

```{r}
# plot gf vs len at each site/time point
goFitGF_lew_len <- ggplot(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta",]) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length, fill = "Fall'23"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length), col = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 1), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length, fill = "Spring'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length), col = "cornflowerblue", fill = "cornflowerblue", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 2), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length, fill = "Fall'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length), col = "slateblue", fill = "slateblue", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 3), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length, fill = "Spring'25"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length), col = "purple4", fill = "purple4", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(E) Predicted ", GF[offset], " vs Length at Lewisetta, with Selection Lines")), x = "GF Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Monitoring Events", breaks = c("Fall'23", "Spring'24", "Fall'24","Spring'25"), values = c("Fall'23"="cadetblue3","Spring'24"="cornflowerblue","Fall'24"="slateblue","Spring'25"="purple4"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitGF_lew_len

goFitGF_yrk_len <-  ggplot(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver",]) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length, fill = "Fall'23"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length), col = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 1), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length, fill = "Spring'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length), col = "cornflowerblue", fill = "cornflowerblue", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 2), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length, fill = "Fall'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length), col = "slateblue", fill = "slateblue", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 3), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length, fill = "Spring'25"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length), col = "purple4", fill = "purple4", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(F) Predicted ", GF[offset], " vs Length at York River, with Selection Lines")), x = "GF Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Monitoring Events", breaks = c("Fall'23", "Spring'24", "Fall'24","Spring'25"), values = c("Fall'23"="cadetblue3","Spring'24"="cornflowerblue","Fall'24"="slateblue","Spring'25"="purple4"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitGF_yrk_len

# plot gf vs len at both sites just final time point
goFitGF_plotfinalTlen <- ggplot(data = fullfit) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length, fill = "Lewisetta"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length), col = "mediumspringgreen", fill = "darkseagreen2", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 4), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length, fill = "YorkRiver"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length), col = "dodgerblue", fill = "dodgerblue", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(C) Predicted ", GF[offset], " vs Final Length, with Selection Lines")), x = "GF Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Experimental Site", breaks = c("Lewisetta", "YorkRiver"), values = c("Lewisetta"="mediumspringgreen", "YorkRiver"="dodgerblue"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitGF_plotfinalTlen
```

Without selection lines:

```{r}
# plot gf vs len at each site/time point
goFitGF_lew_len_nosel <- ggplot(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta",]) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length, fill = "Fall'23"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length), col = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 1), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length, fill = "Spring'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length), col = "cornflowerblue", fill = "cornflowerblue", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 2), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length, fill = "Fall'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length), col = "slateblue", fill = "slateblue", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 3), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length, fill = "Spring'25"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length), col = "purple4", fill = "purple4", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(E) Predicted ", GF[offset], " vs Length at Lewisetta")), x = "GF Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Monitoring Events", breaks = c("Fall'23", "Spring'24", "Fall'24","Spring'25"), values = c("Fall'23"="cadetblue3","Spring'24"="cornflowerblue","Fall'24"="slateblue","Spring'25"="purple4")) +
  theme_classic()
goFitGF_lew_len_nosel

goFitGF_yrk_len_nosel <-  ggplot(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver",]) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length, fill = "Fall'23"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length), col = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 1), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length, fill = "Spring'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length), col = "cornflowerblue", fill = "cornflowerblue", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 2), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length, fill = "Fall'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length), col = "slateblue", fill = "slateblue", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 3), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length, fill = "Spring'25"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length), col = "purple4", fill = "purple4", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(F) Predicted ", GF[offset], " vs Length at York River")), x = "GF Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Monitoring Events", breaks = c("Fall'23", "Spring'24", "Fall'24","Spring'25"), values = c("Fall'23"="cadetblue3","Spring'24"="cornflowerblue","Fall'24"="slateblue","Spring'25"="purple4"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitGF_yrk_len_nosel

# plot gf vs len at both sites just final time point
goFitGF_plotfinalTlen_nosel <- ggplot(data = fullfit) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length, fill = "Lewisetta"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_lew, y = length), col = "mediumspringgreen", fill = "darkseagreen2", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 4), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length, fill = "YorkRiver"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = offset_gf_geno_yrk, y = length), col = "dodgerblue", fill = "dodgerblue", linetype = lty_set("gf_geno", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("(C) Predicted ", GF[offset], " vs Final Length")), x = "GF Offset", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Experimental Site", breaks = c("Lewisetta", "YorkRiver"), values = c("Lewisetta"="mediumspringgreen", "YorkRiver"="dodgerblue"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitGF_plotfinalTlen_nosel
```


Environmental distance vs length:

With Selection Lines:

```{r}
# plot env dist vs length at each site/time point
goFitEnvDist_len_lew_plot <- ggplot(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta",]) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length, fill = "Fall'23"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length), col = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 1), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length, fill = "Spring'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length), col = "cornflowerblue", fill = "cornflowerblue", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 2), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length, fill = "Fall'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length), col = "slateblue", fill = "slateblue", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 3), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length, fill = "Spring'25"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length), col = "purple4", fill = "purple4", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = "(G) Environmental Distance vs Length at Lewisetta, with Selection Lines", x = "Environmental Distance", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Monitoring Events", breaks = c("Fall'23", "Spring'24", "Fall'24","Spring'25"), values = c("Fall'23"="cadetblue3","Spring'24"="cornflowerblue","Fall'24"="slateblue","Spring'25"="purple4"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitEnvDist_len_lew_plot

goFitEnvDist_len_yrk_plot <-  ggplot(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver",]) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length, fill = "Fall'23"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length), col = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 1), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length, fill = "Spring'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length), col = "cornflowerblue", fill = "cornflowerblue", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 2), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length, fill = "Fall'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length), col = "slateblue", fill = "slateblue", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 3), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length, fill = "Spring'25"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length), col = "purple4", fill = "purple4", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = "(H) Environmental Distance vs Length at York River, with Selection Lines", x = "Environmental Distance", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Monitoring Events", breaks = c("Fall'23", "Spring'24", "Fall'24","Spring'25"), values = c("Fall'23"="cadetblue3","Spring'24"="cornflowerblue","Fall'24"="slateblue","Spring'25"="purple4"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitEnvDist_len_yrk_plot

# plot go gf vs len at both sites just final time point
goFitEnvDist_plotfinalTlen <- ggplot(data = fullfit) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length, fill = "Lewisetta"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length), col = "mediumspringgreen", fill = "darkseagreen2", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "sel", "Lewisetta", 4), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length, fill = "YorkRiver"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length), col = "dodgerblue", fill = "dodgerblue", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "sel", "YorkRiver", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = "(D) Environmental Distance vs Final Length, with Selection Lines", x = "Environmental Distance", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Experimental Site", breaks = c("Lewisetta", "YorkRiver"), values = c("Lewisetta"="mediumspringgreen", "YorkRiver"="dodgerblue"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitEnvDist_plotfinalTlen
```

Without Selection Lines:

```{r}
# plot env dist vs length at each site/time point
goFitEnvDist_len_lew_plot_nosel <- ggplot(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta",]) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length, fill = "Fall'23"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length), col = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 1), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length, fill = "Spring'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length), col = "cornflowerblue", fill = "cornflowerblue", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 2), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length, fill = "Fall'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length), col = "slateblue", fill = "slateblue", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 3), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length, fill = "Spring'25"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length), col = "purple4", fill = "purple4", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = "(G) Environmental Distance vs Length at Lewisetta", x = "Environmental Distance", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Monitoring Events", breaks = c("Fall'23", "Spring'24", "Fall'24","Spring'25"), values = c("Fall'23"="cadetblue3","Spring'24"="cornflowerblue","Fall'24"="slateblue","Spring'25"="purple4"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitEnvDist_len_lew_plot_nosel

goFitEnvDist_len_yrk_plot_nosel <-  ggplot(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver",]) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length, fill = "Fall'23"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 1,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length), col = "cadetblue3", fill = "cadetblue3", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 1), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length, fill = "Spring'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 2,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length), col = "cornflowerblue", fill = "cornflowerblue", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 2), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length, fill = "Fall'24"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 3,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length), col = "slateblue", fill = "slateblue", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 3), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length, fill = "Spring'25"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length), col = "purple4", fill = "purple4", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = "(H) Environmental Distance vs Length at York River", x = "Environmental Distance", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Monitoring Events", breaks = c("Fall'23", "Spring'24", "Fall'24","Spring'25"), values = c("Fall'23"="cadetblue3","Spring'24"="cornflowerblue","Fall'24"="slateblue","Spring'25"="purple4"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitEnvDist_len_yrk_plot_nosel

# plot go gf vs len at both sites just final time point
goFitEnvDist_plotfinalTlen_nosel <- ggplot(data = fullfit) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length, fill = "Lewisetta"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_lew, y = length), col = "mediumspringgreen", fill = "darkseagreen2", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "ns", "Lewisetta", 4), se = T) +
  geom_point(data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length, fill = "YorkRiver"), shape = 21, size = 4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", data = fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,], aes(x = env_dist_yrk, y = length), col = "dodgerblue", fill = "dodgerblue", linetype = lty_set("env_dist", "b", "ns", "YorkRiver", 4), se = T) +
  labs(title = "(D) Environmental Distance vs Final Length", x = "Environmental Distance", y = "Length (mm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Experimental Site", breaks = c("Lewisetta", "YorkRiver"), values = c("Lewisetta"="mediumspringgreen", "YorkRiver"="dodgerblue"))+
  theme_classic()
goFitEnvDist_plotfinalTlen_nosel
```


Export all of these plots to pdf:

```{r}
# this version lets me export directly as an editable powerpoint with vector graphics
library(officer) # for powerpoint export/editing
library(rvg) # for converting r graphics to editable vector graphics

doc <- read_pptx() %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitLEA_plotfinalTsurv), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitGF_plotfinalTsurv), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitRDA_plotfinalTsurv), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitEnvDist_plotfinalTsurv), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitLEA_plotfinalTlen), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitGF_plotfinalTlen), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitRDA_plotfinalTlen), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitEnvDist_plotfinalTlen), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitGF_lew_plot), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitGF_yrk_plot), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitLEA_lew_plot), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitLEA_yrk_plot), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitRDA_lew_plot), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitRDA_yrk_plot), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitEnvDist_lew_plot), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitEnvDist_yrk_plot), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitGF_lew_len), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitGF_yrk_len), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitLEA_lew_len), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitLEA_yrk_len), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitRDA_lew_len), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitRDA_yrk_len), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitEnvDist_len_lew_plot), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitEnvDist_len_yrk_plot), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>% add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitEnvDist_plotfinalTlen), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) 
print(doc, target = "results/figures/GO_compare_sel.pptx")

doc <- read_pptx() %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitLEA_plotfinalTsurv_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitGF_plotfinalTsurv_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitRDA_plotfinalTsurv_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitEnvDist_plotfinalTsurv_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitLEA_plotfinalTlen_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitGF_plotfinalTlen_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitRDA_plotfinalTlen_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitEnvDist_plotfinalTlen_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitGF_lew_plot_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitGF_yrk_plot_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitLEA_lew_plot_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitLEA_yrk_plot_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitRDA_lew_plot_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitRDA_yrk_plot_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitEnvDist_lew_plot_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitEnvDist_yrk_plot_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitGF_lew_len_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitGF_yrk_len_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitLEA_lew_len_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitLEA_yrk_len_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitRDA_lew_len_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitRDA_yrk_len_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitEnvDist_len_lew_plot_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitEnvDist_len_yrk_plot_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) %>% add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = dml(ggobj = goFitLEA_plotfinalTsurv_nosel), location = ph_location_type(type = "body")) 
print(doc, target = "results/figures/GO_compare_nosel.pptx")

docx <- read_pptx() %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitLEA_plotfinalTsurv, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitRDA_plotfinalTsurv, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitGF_plotfinalTsurv, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitEnvDist_plotfinalTsurv, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitLEA_plotfinalTlen, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitRDA_plotfinalTlen, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitGF_plotfinalTlen, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitEnvDist_plotfinalTlen, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitGF_lew_plot, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitGF_yrk_plot, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitLEA_lew_plot, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitLEA_yrk_plot, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitRDA_lew_plot, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitRDA_yrk_plot, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitEnvDist_lew_plot, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitEnvDist_yrk_plot, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitGF_lew_len, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitGF_yrk_len, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitLEA_lew_len, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitLEA_yrk_len, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitRDA_lew_len, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitRDA_yrk_len, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>% 
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitEnvDist_len_lew_plot, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5) %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>% 
  ph_with.gg(value = goFitEnvDist_len_yrk_plot, location = ph_location_type(type = "body"), scale = 1.5)
print(docx, target = "results/figures/GO_compare_gg.pptx")
```

## Compare Offset Methods

Now that I have predictions from different methods, I will look at how offset predictions made by these methods compare to each other and how different their ability is to predict experimental fitness.


### Compare Offsets to Each Other

```{r Offset Comparison}
# create a correlation matrix for offsets
go_forcorrs <- fullfit %>% distinct(site_name, bag_site, event, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% filter(event == 4) %>% dplyr::select(site_name, pop, bag_site, offset_rda_lew, offset_rda_yrk, order_lew_rda, order_yrk_rda, offset_gf_geno_lew, offset_gf_geno_yrk, order_lew_geno_gf, order_yrk_geno_gf, offset_lea_go_lew, offset_lea_go_yrk, order_lew_lea, order_yrk_lea, env_dist_lew, env_dist_yrk, order_lew_envdist, order_yrk_envdist)

# check correlations
library(ggcorrplot)
cor_go_raw <- cor(go_forcorrs[,c("offset_rda_lew", "offset_gf_geno_lew", "offset_lea_go_lew", "env_dist_lew", "offset_rda_yrk", "offset_gf_geno_yrk", "offset_lea_go_yrk", "env_dist_yrk")])
cor_go_raw_pmat <- cor_pmat(go_forcorrs[,c("offset_rda_lew", "offset_gf_geno_lew", "offset_lea_go_lew", "env_dist_lew", "offset_rda_yrk", "offset_gf_geno_yrk", "offset_lea_go_yrk", "env_dist_yrk")])

colnames(cor_go_raw) <- rownames(cor_go_raw) <- c("RDA offset: Lewisetta", "GF offset: Lewisetta", "LEA offset: Lewisetta", "Environmental Distance: Lewisetta", "RDA offset: York River", "GF offset: York River", "LEA offset: York River", "Environmental Distance: York River")

# plot these correlations
# raw go
corrs_go_raw_all <- ggcorrplot(cor_go_raw, 
                               p.mat = cor_go_raw_pmat,
                               insig = "blank",
                               lab = T,
                               colors = c("#6D9EC1", "white", "#E46726")) + 
  theme_classic() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "Genomic Offset Correlations",
       x = NULL,
       y = NULL)
corrs_go_raw_all
```

Look also at the difference between go models with and without biotic variables.

```{r}
# create a correlation matrix for offsets
go_forcorrs_bio <- fullfit %>% distinct(site_name, bag_site, event, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% filter(event == 4) %>% dplyr::select(site_name, pop, bag_site, offset_rda_lew, offset_rda_yrk, offset_gf_geno_lew, offset_gf_geno_yrk, offset_lea_go_lew, offset_lea_go_yrk, env_dist_lew, env_dist_yrk, offset_rda_lew_nb, offset_rda_yrk_nb, offset_gf_geno_lew_nb, offset_gf_geno_yrk_nb, offset_lea_go_lew_nb, offset_lea_go_yrk_nb, env_dist_lew_nb, env_dist_yrk_nb)
  
# check correlations
cor_go_raw_bio <- cor(go_forcorrs_bio[,c("offset_rda_lew", "offset_gf_geno_lew", "offset_lea_go_lew", "env_dist_lew", "offset_rda_yrk", "offset_gf_geno_yrk", "offset_lea_go_yrk", "env_dist_yrk", "offset_rda_lew_nb", "offset_gf_geno_lew_nb", "offset_lea_go_lew_nb", "env_dist_lew_nb", "offset_rda_yrk_nb", "offset_gf_geno_yrk_nb", "offset_lea_go_yrk_nb", "env_dist_yrk_nb")])

cor_go_raw_pmat_bio <- cor_pmat(go_forcorrs_bio[,c("offset_rda_lew", "offset_gf_geno_lew", "offset_lea_go_lew", "env_dist_lew", "offset_rda_yrk", "offset_gf_geno_yrk", "offset_lea_go_yrk", "env_dist_yrk", "offset_rda_lew_nb", "offset_gf_geno_lew_nb", "offset_lea_go_lew_nb", "env_dist_lew_nb", "offset_rda_yrk_nb", "offset_gf_geno_yrk_nb", "offset_lea_go_yrk_nb", "env_dist_yrk_nb")])


# plot these correlations
# raw go
corrs_go_raw_all_bio <- ggcorrplot(cor_go_raw_bio, 
                               p.mat = cor_go_raw_pmat_bio,
                               insig = "blank",
                               lab = T,
                               colors = c("#6D9EC1", "white", "#E46726")) + 
  theme_classic() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "Genomic Offset Correlations",
       x = NULL,
       y = NULL)
corrs_go_raw_all_bio

# how different were the offset predictions?
lew_final <- fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "Lewisetta" & fullfit$event == 4,]
yrk_final <- fullfit[fullfit$bag_site == "YorkRiver" & fullfit$event == 4,]

diff_lea_lew <- mean((lew_final$offset_lea_go_lew_nb - lew_final$offset_lea_go_lew) / lew_final$offset_lea_go_lew)
diff_lea_yrk <- mean((yrk_final$offset_lea_go_yrk_nb - yrk_final$offset_lea_go_yrk) / yrk_final$offset_lea_go_yrk)

diff_gf_lew <- mean((lew_final$offset_gf_geno_lew_nb - lew_final$offset_gf_geno_lew) / lew_final$offset_gf_geno_lew)
diff_gf_yrk <- mean((yrk_final$offset_gf_geno_yrk_nb - yrk_final$offset_gf_geno_yrk) / yrk_final$offset_gf_geno_yrk)

diff_rda_lew <- mean((lew_final$offset_rda_lew_nb - lew_final$offset_rda_lew) / lew_final$offset_rda_lew)
diff_rda_yrk <-  mean((yrk_final$offset_rda_yrk_nb - yrk_final$offset_rda_yrk) / yrk_final$offset_rda_yrk)

diff_envdist_lew <- mean((lew_final$env_dist_lew_nb - lew_final$env_dist_lew) / lew_final$env_dist_lew)
diff_envdist_yrk <- mean((yrk_final$env_dist_yrk_nb - yrk_final$env_dist_yrk) / yrk_final$env_dist_yrk)

offset_diffs_bio <- data.frame(method = c("lea","lea","gf","gf","rda","rda","envdist","envdist"), bag_site = rep(c("Lewisetta","YorkRiver"),4), diff_percent = c(diff_lea_lew, diff_lea_yrk, diff_gf_lew, diff_gf_yrk, diff_rda_lew, diff_rda_yrk, diff_envdist_lew, diff_envdist_yrk))

# how different were the offset performances? 
final_corrs_b <- corrs_df[corrs_df$event == 4 & corrs_df$biotic == "b", c("method","bag_site","kendall_surv", "p_adj_surv","signif_surv_adj","kendall_len", "p_adj_len", "signif_len_adj")]
final_corrs_nb <- corrs_df[corrs_df$event == 4 & corrs_df$biotic == "nb", c("method","bag_site","kendall_surv", "p_adj_surv","signif_surv_adj","kendall_len", "p_adj_len", "signif_len_adj")]
colnames(final_corrs_nb) <- c("method","bag_site","kendall_surv_nb", "p_adj_surv_nb","signif_surv_adj_nb","kendall_len_nb", "p_adj_len_nb", "signif_len_adj_nb")
final_corrs <- merge(final_corrs_b, final_corrs_nb, by = c("method", "bag_site"))

final_corrs$diff_surv <- final_corrs$kendall_surv - final_corrs$kendall_surv_nb
final_corrs$diff_len <- final_corrs$kendall_len - final_corrs$kendall_len_nb

write.csv(final_corrs, "results/GO_results/final_correlation_GOfit.csv", row.names = F)

# plot performance differences
disease_vs_no_performance <- ggplot(data = final_corrs) +
  geom_point(data = final_corrs, aes(x = kendall_surv_nb, y = kendall_surv, fill = method, shape = bag_site), size = 4) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Lewisetta" = 21, "YorkRiver" = 24)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = 21))) +
  ylim(-1,0.05)+
  xlim(-1,0.05)+
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1) +
  labs(title = "Genomic Offset Performance (Survival) with and without \nthe Biotic Landscape", x = "Genomic Offset (Environment Only)", y = "Genomic Offset (Disease & Environment)") +
  theme_classic()
disease_vs_no_performance

disease_vs_no_len <- ggplot(data = final_corrs) +
  geom_point(data = final_corrs, aes(x = kendall_len_nb, y = kendall_len, fill = method, shape = bag_site), size = 4) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Lewisetta" = 21, "YorkRiver" = 24)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = 21))) +
  ylim(-1,0.05)+
  xlim(-1,0.05)+
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1) +
  labs(title = "Genomic Offset Performance (Length) with and without \nthe Biotic Landscape", x = "Genomic Offset (Environment Only)", y = "Genomic Offset (Disease & Environment)") +
  theme_classic()
disease_vs_no_len
```


## Plotting Fitness vs Environmental Metrics

```{r}
fullfit
#env_exp <- read.csv("data/EnvDat/exp/exp_scaled_2025-12-08.csv")[,-1]
fullfit_env <- merge(fullfit[fullfit$event == 4,], env_exp, by = "site_name")
fullfit_env_nodup_surv <- fullfit_env[!(duplicated(fullfit_env$surv)),]
fullfit_env_nodup_len <- fullfit_env[!(duplicated(fullfit_env$length)),]

# survival
ggplot(data = fullfit_env_nodup_surv, aes(x = temp_quantile_10, y = surv)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4, fill = "lightblue2") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "steelblue3") +
  labs(title = "Survival as a Function of Temperature", x = "Temperature (10% Quantile)", y = "Survival") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = fullfit_env_nodup_surv, aes(x = temp_quantile_90, y = surv)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4, fill = "lightblue2") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "steelblue3") +
  labs(title = "Survival as a Function of Temperature", x = "Temperature (90% Quantile)", y = "Survival") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = fullfit_env_nodup_surv, aes(x = salinity_quantile_10, y = surv)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4, fill = "lightblue2") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "steelblue3") +
  labs(title = "Survival as a Function of Salinity", x = "Salinity (10% Quantile)", y = "Survival") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = fullfit_env_nodup_surv, aes(x = salinity_quantile_90, y = surv)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4, fill = "lightblue2") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "steelblue3") +
  labs(title = "Survival as a Function of Salinity", x = "Salinity (90% Quantile)", y = "Survival") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = fullfit_env_nodup_surv, aes(x = Dermo_Prevalence, y = surv)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4, fill = "lightblue2") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "steelblue3") +
  labs(title = "Survival as a Function of Disease (Dermo)", x = "Dermo Prevalence", y = "Survival") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = fullfit_env_nodup_surv, aes(x = MSX_Prevalence, y = surv)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4, fill = "lightblue2") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "steelblue3") +
  labs(title = "Survival as a Function of Disease (MSX)", x = "MSX Prevalence", y = "Survival") +
  theme_classic()

# now length
ggplot(data = fullfit_env_nodup_len, aes(x = temp_quantile_10, y = length)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4, fill = "lightblue2") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "steelblue3") +
  labs(title = "Length as a Function of Temperature", x = "Temperature (10% Quantile)", y = "Survival") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = fullfit_env_nodup_len, aes(x = temp_quantile_90, y = length)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4, fill = "lightblue2") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "steelblue3") +
  labs(title = "Length as a Function of Temperature", x = "Temperature (90% Quantile)", y = "Survival") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = fullfit_env_nodup_len, aes(x = salinity_quantile_10, y = length)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4, fill = "lightblue2") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "steelblue3") +
  labs(title = "Length as a Function of Salinity", x = "Salinity (10% Quantile)", y = "Survival") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = fullfit_env_nodup_len, aes(x = salinity_quantile_90, y = length)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4, fill = "lightblue2") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "steelblue3") +
  labs(title = "Length as a Function of Salinity", x = "Salinity (90% Quantile)", y = "Survival") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = fullfit_env_nodup_len, aes(x = Dermo_Prevalence, y = length)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4, fill = "lightblue2") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "steelblue3") +
  labs(title = "Length as a Function of Disease (Dermo)", x = "Dermo Prevalence", y = "Survival") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = fullfit_env_nodup_len, aes(x = MSX_Prevalence, y = length)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4, fill = "lightblue2") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", col = "steelblue3") +
  labs(title = "Length as a Function of Disease (MSX)", x = "MSX Prevalence", y = "Survival") +
  theme_classic()
```
